INVOKE.COMMENT: --- VE-1294 extracted all members by adding large pageLimit--- VE-1269 removed effDate to fetch members --- get social interaction members

MAP.NAME: %socialInteractionMembersList/friendInteractionStatus%='ACCEPTED'||%socialInteractionMembersList/friendInteractionStatus%='INTEAM'
MAP.COMMENT: friend is part of social interaction, increment count

MAP.NAME: $default
MAP.COMMENT: friend is not part of social interaction

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Social Interaction Member Details not found

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
